mentions.note: Down 25% but CEO Ynon Kreiz buying stock; bottoming here. Trades 11x earnings; toy business unloved but Kreiz execution solid; worth buying at these levels.

CEO Ynon Kreiz bought $1M stock post-miss; deploying 18% float buyback + $1.5B more over 3 years. 2026 'investment year' with $150M digital games spend, two major movies (Masters of Universe), 3-6% growth. IP-driven strategy positioning for long-term value capture.
